notes: v0.3.17: End card audio. When Stop is pressed, mic audio cuts completely and the end card branded sound plays into the recording instead. WebAudio mixer graph: two GainNodes (mic + endcard) feeding a shared destination — mic=1/endcard=0 during recording, flips to mic=0/endcard=1 on Stop via setValueAtTime for sample-accurate crossover. No bleed, no gap.
